metadata.title: PDF & Documents Toolbox — 100% local & secure
metadata.description: Free PDF and image tools, 100% local and secure. Merge, split, compress, protect, and convert your documents without sending data over the Internet.
metadata.author: Argus Labs

home.title: PDF & Documents Toolbox
home.subtitle: All tools run locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

sidebar.privacy: No file is ever sent to a server. All processing happens in your browser.

split-pdf.name: Split PDF
split-pdf.description: Separate a PDF into multiple files

compress-pdf.name: Compress PDF
compress-pdf.description: Reduce the size of your PDFs

hash.name: Hash
hash.description: Compute the hash of text or a file

dropZone.label: Drag and drop your files here

pageGrid.selected: {count, plural, one {# page selected} other {# pages selected}}

previewPanel.title: Preview before download
previewPanel.tooManyPagesError: PDF too large (max {max} pages for preview)
previewPanel.pdfError: The PDF preview could not be generated.
previewPanel.imagesSummary: {count, plural, one {# image generated} other {# images generated}}. Images are compressed into a ZIP file.

mergePdf.title: Merge PDFs
mergePdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document. Reorder the files if needed.
mergePdf.minFilesError: Please select at least 2 PDF files to merge.
mergePdf.error: Error merging PDFs. Make sure the files are not corrupted.

splitPdf.title: Split a PDF
splitPdf.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF. Select pages visually.
splitPdf.noPagesError: Please select at least one page to extract.

compressPdf.title: Compress a PDF
compressPdf.description: Greatly reduce a PDF's size by recompressing its images.
compressPdf.pdfJsBrowserError: pdfjs-dist can only be loaded in the browser
compressPdf.strongHint: Recompresses each page as a JPEG image. Big savings, but text is no longer selectable.
compressPdf.structureHint: Keeps text selectable but only compresses the structure (metadata, streams).
compressPdf.dpiHint: 150 DPI is enough for most web and email uses.
compressPdf.error: Error during compression: {message}. Make sure the PDF is valid.

rotatePdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotatePdf.description: Rotate all pages of a PDF clockwise.

deletePages.title: Delete pages
deletePages.description: Delete specific pages from a PDF.
deletePages.noPagesError: Please select at least one page to delete.

reorderPages.title: Reorder pages
reorderPages.description: Change the order of pages in a PDF by drag and drop.

extractPages.title: Extract pages
extractPages.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF into a new file.
extractPages.noPagesError: Please select at least one page to extract.

pdfToImages.title: PDF to Images
pdfToImages.description: Convert each page of a PDF into high-quality images.
pdfToImages.error: Error during conversion: {message}. Make sure the PDF is valid.

imagesToPdf.title: Images to PDF
imagesToPdf.description: Combine multiple images into a single PDF file.
imagesToPdf.noFileError: Please select at least one image.
imagesToPdf.error: Error during conversion: {message}. Check the image formats.

compressImage.title: Compress an image
compressImage.description: Reduce the size of your images with targeted profiles.
compressImage.mediumHint: Good balance for web, email and storage.
compressImage.strongHint: Greatly reduces size. Ideal for previews.
compressImage.convertHint: Often 5 to 10× lighter for photos without transparency.
compressImage.error: Error during compression: {message}. Check the image format.

convertImage.title: Convert format
convertImage.description: Change the format of your images (JPG, PNG, WebP).

resizeImage.title: Resize
resizeImage.description: Change the dimensions of your images.

metadataManager.title: PDF Metadata
metadataManager.description: View, edit or remove your PDFs metadata.
metadataManager.editHint: Edit the fields below then click "Apply changes".
metadataManager.emptyHint: Leave a field empty to remove it.

removeMetadata.title: Remove Metadata
removeMetadata.description: Clean a PDF's metadata (author, title, etc.).

hash.title: Hash
hash.description: Compute the digital fingerprint of text or a file with several algorithms.
hash.info: A hash is a unique fingerprint generated from text or a file. It is used to verify a document's integrity (detect any modification) or to compare two files without opening them. Even a tiny change in the source text produces a completely different hash.
hash.md5Unavailable: MD5 not available in browser (use SHA-256)

secrets.title: Secret Generator
secrets.description: Generate UUIDs, API keys, secure tokens and strong passwords.

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.fileImported: File imported. Click Format to validate.

twitterVideo.title: X / Twitter Downloader
twitterVideo.description: Paste a post link to download the video as MP4.
twitterVideo.noUrlError: Please paste the X/Twitter post URL.

merge-pdf.title: Merge PDF — Combine multiple PDF files
merge-pdf.description: Merge multiple PDF files into a single document. 100% local, no data sent over the Internet.

split-pdf.title: Split PDF — Separate a PDF into multiple files
split-pdf.description: Split a PDF file into multiple documents. Extract by page, interval or range. 100% local.

compress-pdf.title: Compress PDF — Reduce PDF file size
compress-pdf.description: Reduce the size of your PDF files without quality loss. Local compression in the browser.

rotate-pdf.title: Rotate PDF — Rotate PDF pages
rotate-pdf.description: Rotate all pages of a PDF by 90°, 180° or 270°. 100% local processing.

delete-pages.title: Delete pages from a PDF
delete-pages.description: Delete specific pages from a PDF file. Visually select pages to remove.

reorder-pages.title: Reorder PDF pages
reorder-pages.description: Change the order of pages in a PDF by drag and drop. 100% local visual reordering.

extract-pages.title: Extract pages from a PDF
extract-pages.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF to create a new document. Visual page selection.

pdf-to-images.title: PDF to Images — Convert a PDF to images
pdf-to-images.description: Convert each page of a PDF to PNG or JPEG images. Local export without a server.

images-to-pdf.title: Images to PDF — Convert images to PDF
images-to-pdf.description: Combine multiple images (JPG, PNG, WebP) into a single PDF file. Reorder by drag and drop.

compress-image.title: Compress Image — Reduce image file size
compress-image.description: Reduce the size of your JPG, PNG, WebP images without visible loss. Local compression.

convert-image.title: Convert Image — Change image format
convert-image.description: Convert your images between JPG, PNG and WebP. Local conversion in the browser.

resize-image.title: Resize Image — Change image dimensions
resize-image.description: Change the width and height of your images. 100% local resizing.

remove-metadata.title: Remove PDF metadata
remove-metadata.description: Erase all metadata (author, title, dates) from a PDF in one click. Complete cleanup.

metadata-manager.title: Manage PDF metadata
metadata-manager.description: Read, edit or remove PDF metadata. 100% local metadata editor.

hash.title: Hash — Compute digital fingerprint
hash.description: Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashes of text or files. Integrity check.

secrets.title: Secret Generator — UUID, API keys, tokens
secrets.description: Generate UUID v4, API keys, secure tokens and strong passwords. 100% local.

json-formatter.title: JSON Formatter — Format and validate JSON
json-formatter.description: Format, validate and beautify your JSON. Automatic indentation and error detection.

twitter-video.title: X / Twitter Downloader — Download a video
twitter-video.description: Download X (Twitter) videos as MP4. Paste the post link and get the video.

metadata.title: Legal & Privacy
metadata.description: Legal notices, privacy policy and terms of use of PDF & Documents Toolbox.

editor.title: Site publisher
editor.p1: PDF & Documents Toolbox is a free web service offered as a progressive web app (PWA).
editor.p2: This service is hosted in a fully static way. No personal data is collected, stored or processed on a server.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.commitmentText: No file is ever sent to a server. All processing happens locally in your web browser. Your documents never leave your device.
privacy.documentsText: loaded temporarily into your device's random access memory (RAM) to be processed by client-side JavaScript libraries.
privacy.persistenceText: files are automatically removed from memory when you close the tab, reload the page or click "Close" in the preview.
privacy.collectionText: we do not collect, store or transmit any file, metadata or document content.
privacy.cookiesText: This site does not use any tracking cookies, spy pixels or third-party analytics service (Google Analytics, etc.). Only technical session cookies may be used by the Next.js framework for the application to work.
privacy.hostingText: The site is served as static files. No server-side processing is performed on your documents. Processing libraries (pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, jspdf) run entirely in your browser.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.purposeText: PDF & Documents Toolbox provides utilities for manipulating PDF documents and images, executed exclusively client-side in the user's browser.
terms.resp1: You are solely responsible for the documents you process with this tool.
terms.resp2: This service is provided for information purposes. We recommend keeping a backup copy of your original documents before any modification.
terms.resp3: The user agrees not to use the service for illegal activities (counterfeiting, fraud, copyright infringement, etc.).
terms.limitationText: The service is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind. The publisher cannot be held liable for any data loss, document alteration or processing errors. The user is invited to verify their documents before use.
terms.propertyText: The source code, design and visual identity of this site are the property of the publisher. Third-party libraries used (pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, jspdf, shadcn/ui, etc.) are subject to their respective open-source licenses.

credits.title: Credits & Libraries
credits.intro: This site is built with the following open-source technologies and libraries:
credits.note: No metadata from these libraries is inserted into the documents you generate.

gdpr.title: Right to be forgotten & deletion
gdpr.p1: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data. As no data is collected, no action is required on your part: your documents exist only in your browser and disappear automatically.
gdpr.p2: For any privacy-related question, you can contact us (see below).

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For any question about legal notices, privacy or how the service works:

manifest.name: PDF & Documents Toolbox
manifest.description: Free PDF and image tools, 100% local and secure.
